input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8856 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-webapp:9.4.0.RC1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests must adapt to the Jetty 9.4.0.RC1 WebAppClassLoader.Context API changes: isSystemClass/isServerClass now take Class<?> and isSystemResource/isServerResource are required.

Avoid choosing JSP-specific scenarios unless deliberately adding JSP support, because JSP execution may require optional Jetty JSP artifacts that are not needed for core WebAppContext/static-content/descriptor/classloader coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or environment/system property is required for meaningful Jetty webapp coverage. The resolved artifact brings the core Jetty server/servlet stack transitively, and the javac failure is an API-shape change in WebAppClassLoader.Context rather than missing setup.
